creator: bagas1983@mail.ru
text:
Created attachment 251373
type of graph

Hello.
After updating programs on the server, munin does not build graphs correctly.
There was no munin program update in the list.

My system FreeBSD 14.0-RELEASE-p6 amd64.

# locale
LANG=en_US.UTF-8
LC_CTYPE="en_US.UTF-8"
LC_COLLATE="en_US.UTF-8"
LC_TIME="en_US.UTF-8"
LC_NUMERIC="en_US.UTF-8"
LC_MONETARY="en_US.UTF-8"
LC_MESSAGES="en_US.UTF-8"
LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8

# pkg version -v | egrep 'rrd|munin'
munin-common-2.0.75_1 = up-to-date with index
munin-master-2.0.75_1 = up-to-date with index
munin-node-2.0.75_2 = up-to-date with index
rrdtool-1.8.0_4 = up-to-date with index


I attached a screenshot of the graphs to the topic.
Please help me solve the problem, I don’t understand what has changed in plotting.
